Sandbox_SCBEnableBoards_tooltip: After changing this parameter, reconnect to the server.
Sandbox_SCBEnableSpawnMarkers_tooltip: Markers will appear at board locations.
Sandbox_SCBMaxDistanceToBoard_tooltip: Maximum distance to interact with the board UI.
Sandbox_SCBBackgroundDynamicVisual_toolt: Randomize paper sheets on the board background.
Sandbox_SCBEnableDefaultStyles_tooltip: Show default board styles in the creation list.
Sandbox_SCBsafeCalculation_tooltip: Limits collision checks for dynamic textures.
Sandbox_SCBVisualMsgFromAdmin_tooltip: Admin messages on the board will be highlighted.
